tagline: News tuned to your real-world moment.

designSystem.style: Editorial minimalism with warm parchment tones, vibrant burnt-orange brand color, and clean typographic hierarchy. Card-based layout with subtle borders and contextual color coding per topic/category. Supports light (warm cream) and dark (deep charcoal) themes.

screens: Home — Moment Modes (Commute, Lunch, Bedtime, Deep Dive) with adaptive article feeds, featured story cards, and local impact banner
Article Detail — Story Layers (Summary, Explainer, Full Analysis) with Local Impact Cards and cross-source compare prompt
Compare — Cross-Source Compare showing same story from Washington Post, Wall Street Journal, and The Guardian with tone analysis, emphasis breakdown, and word count depth bars
Saved — Collections library (Transit & City, Housing Market, Tech & AI, Health & Wellness) with article counts, smart preview, and collection drill-down
Settings — User profile, theme toggle (light/dark), personalization (location, industry, mode), sources, topic interests, and notification preferences
